title: Complete ICT Lesson Notes for SHS
description: Comprehensive ICT learning materials covering the Ghana Education Service syllabus for Senior High School students. Includes practical exercises, diagrams, and exam preparation tips.

title: Web Development Starter Guide
description: A beginner-friendly guide to modern web development. Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React from scratch with hands-on projects and real-world examples.

title: Professional CV Template Pack
description: Stand out with 5 professionally designed CV/resume templates. Modern, ATS-friendly layouts in editable PDF format with matching cover letter templates.

title: Linux Administration Handbook
description: Master Linux server administration from installation to advanced configuration. Covers Ubuntu, CentOS, networking, security, and shell scripting.

title: Business Proposal Template
description: A professionally formatted business proposal template. Perfect for ICT consultants and tech businesses. Includes sections for scope, pricing, timeline, and terms.

title: Networking Fundamentals E-Book
description: Understand computer networking from the ground up. Topics include TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, subnetting, wireless networks, and network security basics.
